loading_hint: Modul tye ka cako ki i CDN. Ka man medde, nen kit ma itye kwede ki yo me kube.
hub.subtitle: Jami me Functional Behavior Assessment, coc me data me ABC, ki yub me Behavior Intervention Plan.
hub.select_student_first: Yer latin kwan malo wek icak
hub.abc_desc: Coo gin ma okwongo (antecedent), kit me tim (behavior), ki gin ma olubo (consequence)
hub.obs_desc: Coc me cawa, dwong, onyo lwong me kit me tim i cawa ma kombedi
hub.overview_desc: Yo ma kit me tim lubo, cal me coc, ki kwan me piri-piri
hub.freq_desc: Kwano oyot ki lubu wel pi dakika acel
hub.interval_desc: Cawa me kwac (partial), me ducu (whole), onyo me kombedi (momentary)
hub.token_desc: Bao me jaki ma inyuto ki tokens ma iromo loko
hub.hotspot_desc: Nong cawa ma kit me tim timme malac i tic ducu
hub.export_desc: Gam data me ABC ki coc obed JSON onyo coc
hub.record_desc: Mwon IEP/peny me ngiyo pi kwan ma AI miyo
hub.hypothesis_desc: Cal me A→B→C→Tic mi kit me tim ki yub me AI
hub.goals_desc: Mite me kit me tim ma SMART ma AI ocoyo ki lubo wa ber ber
hub.contract_desc: Cik me kit me tim i kin latin kwan ki lapwony ma AI ocoyo
hub.cycle_desc: Cawa me 7 me "acting-out cycle" ki yo me kony
hub.reinforcer_desc: Nong jami me jaki ma loyo i kin kwena abic
hub.choice_desc: Karatasi me yer ma latin kwan tye ka neno pi loyo kome kene
hub.audit_desc: Lok 8 me coc me kabedo me kwan ki ngec me AI
hub.triangulation_desc: Pim data me kabedo 3 onyo mada wek inong kacel
hub.impact_desc: Pim dwong, cawa, ki wel mwaka me kit me tim
hub.crisis_desc: Yub me kony me peko marac ma tye ki tier adek
hub.traffic_desc: Karatasi mar/kweri/cwer pi kabedo me kit me tim ma latin kwan tye ka neno
hub.datasheet_desc: Karatasi me coc me dwong, cawa, ABC, onyo latency ma iromo coyo
hub.homenote_desc: Lok ki gang ma AI ocoyo ki yer me dwan
hub.fidelity_desc: Lok me coc me tic me BIP me nino kacel ma AI ocoyo
hub.feasibility_desc: Peny 5 me ngiyo ka konya tic kwede ki ngec me AI
hub.gas_desc: Goal Attainment Scaling ki coc ma AI ocoyo
hub.pocket_desc: Kwena macek me BIP ma iromo gwoko i clipboard
hub.abagraph_desc: Cal me publication-standard ki ruk me phase, ruk me lubo, ki ngiyo me wang
hub.abaguide_desc: Glossary ma iromo yenyo, sched me reinforcement, yat me yero ki bal ma jo timo
hub.abaquiz_desc: Pim ngec me ABA — nong badge i 80%+
hub.antecedentmod_desc: Ngec me AI me loko kabedo wek igeng kit me tim mapwod pe ocako
hub.bcbahandoff_desc: Dashboard me data pi BCBA ki packet me coyo me yor pi consultation
hub.biascheck_desc: Nyuto yo ma data lubo i mwol pi paro me bias ma kane — dongo, pe bal
hub.caseload_desc: Nen latin kwan ducu — status, yo ma gilubo, lok me kony, ki kwena me AI
hub.casestudy_desc: Lok me case ma AI ocoyo ki tic me phase 4 ki kwan
hub.commlog_desc: Lubu kube ki gang i yo aryo ki lubu kor — wek pe gang mo cwer
hub.condprob_desc: Pim me foreground ki background pi ngiyo me lok me ABC ki data
hub.consent_desc: Karatasi me consent ma iromo loko pi exchange me data ki gang — kelo, coyo, miyo obed JSON
hub.counseling_desc: Tuku me roli me AI ki cik me latin kwan pi tic me counseling
hub.cultural_desc: Lok 8 me cuun-ki-paro mapwod pe ingi kit me tim i yo me cultural humility
hub.cumrecord_desc: Cal me cumulative frequency me Skinner — gin ma kwongo me nyuto data me ABA
hub.deescalate_desc: Tic me yweyo, cawa me wang, kombi me sensory, ki grounding — kony me kweo i cawa ma kombedi
hub.drstrategy_desc: Yer differential reinforcement ma ber (DRA, DRI, DRO, DRL)
hub.dtt_desc: Discrete Trial Training — coc me trial acel acel ki cik me loyo ki cako auto
hub.effectsize_desc: Pim Tau-U, NAP, ki PND wek inen ber pa intervention ki pim me phase
hub.familyvoice_desc: Karatasi pi gang me miyo ngec, lok me kit kwo, ki yom cwiny — ki loko leb me AI
hub.fbaworkflow_desc: Yo me tic ducu pi FBA, BIP, ki RTI ki pwony me AI
hub.fcttemplate_desc: Yub me Functional Communication Training ki yer me modality
hub.gamify_desc: Lubu cwiny ma latin kwan tye ka neno ki streaks, badges, quests, ki buk me paro
hub.glossary_desc: Lok 25+ me ABA ma iromo yenyo ki tyer mayot ki labolo me kwo
hub.homelog_desc: Coc me kit me tim ma yot pi gang ki leb me nino ducu
hub.iepgoals_desc: Ngec kombedi, mite SMART, lok matidi, accommodations, ki yub me lubu ma AI ocoyo
hub.iepprep_desc: Packet me yubo me coko ki kwan me data, lok me wac, ki step ma lubo ma AI ocoyo
hub.intervention_desc: Yub me intervention me cabit mapol ma AI ocoyo ki mite ma iromo pim ki milestone
hub.ioacalc_desc: Inter-Observer Agreement ki yo 6 — point-by-point, interval, scored/unscored, exact count
hub.latency_desc: Pim cawa ki cing kun stimulus pa cing me dwoko ki mean, median, ki range
hub.maintenance_desc: Lubu gwoko ngec lacen ka loyo ki generalization i kabedo, jo, ki jami mapatpat
hub.mtss_desc: Pyramid me tier 3 me loyo kony me tier mapol ki ngec me AI me yero tier
hub.nlabc_desc: Coo onyo mwon coc me ngiyo i leb me nino — AI yubo ki obedo ABC kene
hub.obscoach_desc: Pwony ki cawa ma kombedi me ber pa coc me data — nongo gap, miyo ngec, ki kwano data
hub.pdpath_desc: Modul me pwony me yubo ngec me ABA step ki step
hub.predict_desc: Ngec me yo ki AI ma nyuto kero, kabedo, ki gin ma cako kit me tim — ki yo me geng
hub.prefassess_desc: Nong reinforcer ki yo — MSWO, Paired Stimulus, ki Free Operant
hub.progress_desc: Cano me lubu pi IEP ma a ki data me kit me tim ma okoko
hub.progressreport_desc: Cano me lubu ma AI ocoyo ki kwan me data, ngiyo me yo, lubu me mite, ki leb ma yot pi gang
hub.qualitycheck_desc: Ngiyo me AI me lok me ABC ma icoyo ki tam me dongo
hub.reframe_desc: AI coyo coc me deficit obed leb me asset ki tek
hub.reinforcement_desc: Peny me motivation — nong gin ma cwalo latin kwan ki yo 6
hub.relmap_desc: Cal me kube me latin kwan — ludongo ma gigeno, lurem, gang, lupwony — ki ngiyo me gap
hub.replacebehavior_desc: Tem kit me tim marac ki kit mukene ma tic acel ki yo me pwonyo
hub.restorative_desc: Coc step ki step me yubo bal, circle me kanyakla, ki dwoko cen
hub.sandbox_desc: Gam data me latin kwan me sim pi PD, pwony mapwod pe ocako tic, onyo pwonyo ABA i komi pe ki latin kwan adada
hub.scatterplot_desc: Cal me cawa × kit me tim me nong yo me cawa — bino ki data me ABC kene
hub.selfcheck_desc: Cuun cwiny ma latin kwan tye ka tic ki buk me paro — coyo dwan gi
hub.sessionnotes_desc: Lok me ngiyo ki cawa ma coyo ki dwan — coyo lok ka tye ka timme
hub.sessiontracker_desc: Pim me kit me tim ma session-based ki kwano rate
hub.snapshot_desc: Gam ki kelo JSON snapshot pi exchange me data i kin gang ki lapwony
hub.snapshot_title: Exchange me Snapshot pa Latin Kwan
hub.socialvalidity_desc: Scales me TARF ki IRP-15 me pim me yer pa kony — mite pi publication
hub.taskanalysis_desc: Tii ngec ki step ma iromo pwonyo ki chaining me anyim, ngec, onyo task ducu, ki lubu me prompt
hub.teamnotes_desc: Lok me tic kacel me roli mapol ki cawa pi lupwony, paras, lukony, ki gang
hub.treatintegrity_desc: Coo ka intervention tye ka timme calo yub — lubu fidelity me lok mo
hub.trends_desc: Cal me SVG ma nyuto yo me tek, dwong me kabedo, ki heatmap me nino/cawa
hub.bipgen_desc: Coo Behavior Intervention Plan ki data ni.
hub.cantdowontdo_desc: Pok skill vs. performance deficits wek iyer kony ma ber.
hub.competingpathways_desc: Tem kit me tim ma imito ki kit me alternative ma lubo yo me peko.
hub.functionquiz_desc: Pwony me nong tic me kit me tim ki labolo macek.
hub.mipractice_desc: Pwony lok me MI ki dwoko me latin kwan me sim.
hub.practicum_desc: Tii case me pwony ki cako gi ki agikki.
hub.replacementbehavior_desc: Nong kit me tim ma tic acel ma romo mite pa latin kwan.
abc.setting_placeholder: calo, Kabedo me kwan, Yoo, Kabedo me cam
overview.empty_desc: Cak coc me data me ABC onyo tii ngiyo ma kombedi wek inen yo kany.
hotspot.tap_hint: Mwony cell wek imed. Mwony nying me tic wek iloko.
record.desc: Mwon mite me IEP, lok me peny, onyo lok me lubu pi ngiyo ma AI miyo.
fidelity.generate: AI Coo Lok me Coc ki BIP
